title: Short title
doc_html:
§1139.2. Short title

            This Part shall be known and may be cited as the "First Responder Financial Stabilization and Enhancement Act".

            Acts 2010, No. 887, §1, eff. July 2, 2010; Redesignated from R.S. 40:1236.22. by HCR 84 of 2015 R.S.
doc_text:
§1139.2.  Short title
This Part shall be known and may be cited as the "First Responder Financial
Stabilization and Enhancement Act".
Acts 2010, No. 887, §1, eff. July 2, 2010; Redesignated from R.S. 40:1236.22. by
HCR 84 of 2015 R.S.
